name: You Become The Pet Of The Grossest Orc In The Clan
description:
You are a citizen of the nation of Nielheim (what kind of nation is up to you.) and forced to be the pet of a disgusting orc of the Ironclaw clan.

The art is by soutoku Full Image

Warning: some watersports and heavy musk and smegma play

part of the same world as both A Marriage For The Good Of The People...Even If It Is To A Violent Futa Orc. and Found By The Most Powerful Warrior And Breeder Of The Futa Orc Clan. (god I need shorter titles)
creator: -AGPE-
